successful_fast_canary.claim_boundary: Valid diagnostic Fast evidence inside a protocol-superseded root; not paired T6 promotion evidence, a product SLO, or a public benchmark claim.

host_scheduling.pause_stage: local construction before recall or provider dispatch
host_scheduling.latency_policy: The official wrapper duration includes cold construction and deliberate host-yield pauses. The adapter recall_duration_ms remains the query-path measurement.

stop_reason.reason: The frozen root rebuilt the same 670-resource case independently for Fast plus three Deep candidates. The governing plan requires one exact Fast/Deep treatment pair per case, so continuing the 48-row model-selection screen would add latency and cost without being required for the T6 feasibility decision.

external_dispatch_audit.conclusion: The Sonnet reservation is an internal pre-dispatch ceiling, not provider liability. No Deep generation was accepted or billed.

authorization_requirements: freeze a new single-candidate paired manifest before observing treatment output
construct each case once and clone the immutable pre-query database into distinct Fast and Deep scratch databases
prove identical pre-query corpus and policy state across each pair
preserve this root as diagnostic-only evidence
